case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/ TAX COLLECTOR VS. CALVIN DOUGLAS THACKER

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/ TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT THACKER, CALVIN DOUGLAS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-31-2012 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $85.95 - SERVED JUN-28-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT THACKER, CALVIN DOUGLAS

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-31-2012 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO DEC-21-2012 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) /AUTH TO APPEAR FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/ TAX COLLECTOR

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-21-2012 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JAN-24-2013 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: S. VANTREE. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

FRED TAFRESHI FROM SF/TAX COLLECTORS SIGNED SC-109 ON BEHALF OF THE PLAINTIFF, IN ORDER TO CONTINUE THIS CASE TO A FUTURE HEARING DATE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/ TAX COLLECTOR

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-25-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-25-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY ARTURO MARTINEZ, SR. COLLECTION OFFICER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: M. GOODMAN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-25-2013 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/ TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THACKER, CALVIN DOUGLAS $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $85.95 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,085.95 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
